digest.component_or_area: event envelope attribution helper and reducer
propositions: Stamp denormalized author name+email plus an optional author_id onto every local mutating event's envelope.
Provide attribution_fields helper that resolves git email and optional identity, cached per canonical repo_root so lookups run at most once.
Thread an optional attribution dict through all four local envelope-composing sites (append_event, txn cores, delete writers, compact snapshots).
Populate author_id only when resolve_current_identity returns non-None, omitting it otherwise.
Surface author_email/author_id present-only in the reducer at create, comment, revert, and signature processors.
Ensure pre-change events without attribution keys replay byte-identical with no new keys, preserving back-compat.
